storyboard.content: I have severe sharp pain in my lower right side of my belly that started around my belly button and has moved and keeps getting worse
I feel nauseous and have vomited twice this morning
I have a fever of 101.2 degrees that started a few hours ago
Symptoms started about 12 hours ago and have been getting steadily worse since then
The pain is about an 8 out of 10 and even walking makes it worse - I cannot eat or drink anything right now
I am a 22-year-old man with no major health problems
I have no appetite at all and the pain gets sharper when I move around
